title: Peninsula
tmdbOverview: A soldier and his team battle hordes of post-apocalyptic zombies in the wastelands of the Korean Peninsula.
synopsis: Peninsula (2020) is a horror, action and thriller film from South Korea. It has a 5.5 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a MA15+ certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
